collections.name: Top AI Research Papers 2025
collections.description: The most influential and cited papers in artificial intelligence, large language models, and machine learning published in 2025. Covers scaling, reasoning, multimodality, alignment, and agents.
collections.author: trelk-team

collections.name: Best Resources to Learn Python
collections.description: A curated collection of the best tutorials, documentation, videos, and repositories to learn Python from beginner to advanced. Includes official docs, YouTube courses, GitHub projects, and interactive platforms.
collections.author: trelk-team

collections.name: Programmer Essays Worth Re-reading
collections.description: Timeless writing from the giants of software craft. Essays that have shaped how generations of developers think about code, abstractions, careers, and the nature of programming itself. Worth reading once, then again every few years.
collections.author: trelk-team

collections.name: Iconic Tech Talks That Changed Computing
collections.description: The talks every developer should see at least once. From Engelbart's Mother of All Demos to Bret Victor's visions of the future, these talks shaped how we think about computing, programming, and what software could be.
collections.author: trelk-team

collections.name: Wikipedia Rabbit Holes for Curious Minds
collections.description: Strange, wonderful, and slightly haunting corners of human knowledge. Mysterious places, impossible coincidences, ancient machines, and the people who shaped history without ever appearing in textbooks. The kind of articles that keep you reading at 2 AM.
collections.author: trelk-team
